prompt: A toll-keeper bars the only bridge. He wants coin to raise the gate — or you can chance the ford downstream.

options.label: Pay the toll
options.result: The gate creaks up and you roll across dry.

options.label: Ford the river
options.result: The current hammers the wheels, but you make it.

prompt: A merchant's cart lies broken by the roadside. He begs for an escort to the next waystation — and promises to pay well.

options.label: Escort them
options.result: Raiders test the detour, but his purse is heavy.

options.label: Leave them
options.result: You press on. His fate is his own.

prompt: A hunter swears a game-trail shaves an hour off the road ahead. It looks rough, and unwatched.

options.label: Take the shortcut
options.result: The ruts jar the carriage, but you gain ground.

prompt: A wayside shrine stands half-swallowed by ivy. An offering bowl waits at its foot.

options.label: Make an offering
options.result: A warm resolve settles over the convoy.

options.label: Pass it by
options.result: You tip your hat and roll on.

prompt: A wounded outrider hails you. Patch him up and he'll ride ahead to clear the worst of the road.

options.label: Tend the scout
options.result: Mended, he scouts a smoother line for you.

options.label: Wave him off
options.result: No time. You leave him to the roadside.

prompt: A supply caravan is selling spare timber and iron braces at a steep markup — enough to shore the carriage up.

options.label: Buy supplies
options.result: Fresh braces creak into place. Sturdier now.

options.label: Move along
options.result: Too dear. You keep your coin.
